# ShareLock

> ShareLock converts HTML to PDF or Word (DOCX) online — free, private, and
> instant. Paste a link (a Claude artifact or any HTML page) or drop an .html
> file; download a pixel-perfect PDF or an editable .docx, and optionally send
> a safe, sandboxed, tamper-evident link. No sign-up. Files are encrypted at
> rest and auto-deleted when their link expires.

## What it does

- Convert HTML to PDF (real headless Chromium rendering; modern CSS, fonts, and
  page breaks preserved).
- Convert HTML to Word / DOCX (editable; headings, text, and images preserved).
- Convert a Claude artifact or a live URL to PDF/DOCX (fetched server-side
  behind SSRF protections).
- Share a private, sandboxed link whose SHA-256 fingerprint is re-verified on
  every open.
- Optional free workspace: visual (Canva-style) editor, AI editing, comments,
  access control, and Microsoft Purview-style sensitivity labels.

## Key pages

- Home / converter: /
- FAQ and converter comparison: /faq
- Create a free workspace: /register
- Sign in: /login

## How to convert (no account)

1. Go to the home page.
2. Paste a link or drop an .html file.
3. Click Convert.
4. Download the PDF or DOCX, or copy the safe link.

## Privacy & security

- Encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.
- Auto-deleted when the link expires (1, 7, or 30 days).
- Rendered in a sandbox with no network access and no access to your data.
- Tamper-evident: SHA-256 fingerprint re-verified on every view.

## Comparison (summary)

Versus paid HTML-to-PDF APIs (PDFShift, DocRaptor, Api2Pdf), ShareLock needs no
account or API key, is free, adds DOCX output and a shareable secure link, and
auto-deletes your data. Versus DIY tools (Puppeteer, wkhtmltopdf), ShareLock
needs no servers or setup. Paid APIs suit high-volume programmatic use; DIY
suits teams wanting full control of their own infrastructure. See /faq.
